location_description: A well-maintained space used primarily by the staff, the kitchen is kept orderly despite the demands of hosting guests. Items are usually returned to their proper places, making anything out of order stand out.
The living room serves as a comfortable gathering space for guests, with carefully arranged furniture and decor reflecting the Auren family’s taste. It has seen steady use throughout the evening.
A private and neatly kept bedroom, arranged with care and attention to detail. Personal belongings are stored out of sight, and anything left exposed tends to draw attention.
Victor’s study, a controlled and orderly space where important items are kept and handled. It is not a room guests would typically enter without reason.
The garden is well-kept but largely separate from the activity inside the house. It offers a quiet space away from the structure and routine of the main household.
The dining room has been set up to host guests, with everything arranged for presentation and service. Movement through this space has been frequent throughout the evening.
The main entry connects the interior of the house to the outside, serving as the primary point of arrival and departure. It has seen consistent use as guests come and go.

A well-maintained space used primarily by the staff, the kitchen is filled to the brim with lots pots and pans for cooking. Food, plates and utensils cover the counter. There is a large meal being prepared.

The living room serves as a comfortable gathering space for guests, with carefully arranged furniture and decor reflecting the Auren family’s taste. Lots of people have been in and out of this room this evening.
A private and neatly kept bedroom, arranged with care and attention to detail. Personal belongings are stored out of sight, and anything left exposed tends to draw attention.
Victor’s study, a controlled and orderly space where important items are kept and handled. It is not a room guests would typically enter without reason.
The garden is well-kept but largely separate from the activity inside the house. It offers a quiet space away from the structure and routine of the evening’s gathering.
The dining room is ornately decorated with candles and a beautiful table cloth draped on the table. This room is the center of attention this evening as a dinner party is being hosted.
The main entry connects the interior of the house to the outside, serving as the primary point of arrival and departure. It has seen consistent use as guests come and go.
The kitchen is an incredibly tidy , well maintained space by the the staff. All the food is stocked and typically everything is the correct position.
The living is the main space the family spends time in. It is a large space with incredible decorations picked out family. The couches wrap the room and face the fireplace.
The bedroom is normally neatly kept and is housed by the daughter of the family. It is a childhood bedroom as stuffed animals line the bed and old pictures and art work lines the walls.
The study is used by many members of the family, but mainly Victor. There are many important items and documents held in this room and the door usually remains shut so others do not wander in.

The garden is overflowing with tomatoes and cucumbers this year. It is very well kept and also has lots of the family's favorite flowers in the springtime. It is a quiet getaway for guests and family members away from the house.

The dining room contains an overly large wooden table with a beautiful chandelier. It is often decorated differently for different hosting occasions. Everything in this room arranged in preparation for the next meal.
The main entry connects the interior of the house to the outside, serving as the primary point of arrival and departure. It has seen consistent use as guests come and go.
